description_long: This is a rectangular, industrial-style outdoor air conditioning unit with a robust metallic casing. The front face features a large, square grille with closely spaced horizontal and vertical bars, behind which a prominent fan blade is visible. The sides are solid with some paneling details, and the back has a wide, ribbed heat exchanger surface for efficient airflow. The unit stands on two sturdy metal feet, elevating it slightly above the ground, and has mounting brackets for secure installation. The overall finish is matte gray, giving it a utilitarian and weather-resistant appearance. No visible branding or control panels are present on the exterior.
description: A robust, rectangular outdoor air conditioner with a large front grille, visible fan, and ribbed heat exchanger on the back, finished in matte gray metal.
description_view_0: The front view shows a large square grille with a visible fan behind it and a solid panel to the right.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a solid metal panel with a raised rectangular detail and mounting brackets extending outward.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a wide, ribbed heat exchanger surface and the two metal feet supporting the unit.
description_view_3: The right side view shows two vertical vented panels and the mounting brackets, with no grille or fan visible.
attribute_grille_pattern: Square grid pattern with closely spaced horizontal and vertical metal bars forming a mesh.
attribute_exhaust_vent_design: Single large ribbed exhaust vent on the back, vertically oriented, spanning most of the rear surface.
